title: Mississippi Maternal Health Momnibus Act; create.
summary: An Act Be Known As The Mississippi Maternal Health Momnibus Act; To Provide For A Variety Of Maternal Health Services For Pregnant And Postpartum Women; To Amend Section 27-65-111, Mississippi Code Of 1972, To Exempt From Sales Taxation Sales Of Children's Diapers, Diaper Bags, Diaper Rash Cream, Baby Wipes, Baby Powder And Baby Formula; To Amend Section 43-13-117, Mississippi Code Of 1972, To Provide Medicaid Coverage For Certain Services Provided By This Act; And For Related Purposes.

actions.action: Referred To Public Health and Human Services;Appropriations A
